title: Jambughoda Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Jambughoda Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Gujarat

overview.short: Jambughoda is a Wildlife Sanctuary situated in Jambughoda Tehsil, in the South-Central part of Gujarat, and the Khathiar-Gir dry deciduous forests' ecoregion in India.
overview.description: Jambughoda is a Wildlife Sanctuary situated in Jambughoda Tehsil, in the South-Central part of Gujarat, and the Khathiar-Gir dry deciduous forests' ecoregion in India. It is located 70 km from Vadodara and 20 km from prominent tourist places such as Pawagadh and Champaner.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Jambughoda State
topPlaces.description: Jambughoda State, previously known as Narukot and Tokalpur state, was a small princely state in India during the time of the British Raj. Its last ruler acceded to the Union of India on 10 June 1948.

topPlaces.name: Jambughoda
topPlaces.description: Jambughoda is a village and Tehsil in Panchmahal district in the Indian state of Gujarat. The village has a population of 2,731, while the overall tehsil has a population of 42,476.

topPlaces.name: Bodeli
topPlaces.description: Bodeli is a town and taluka in Chhota Udaipur district in the eastern part of the state of Gujarat, India.

items.note: Jambughoda State, previously known as Narukot and Tokalpur state, was a small princely state in India during the time of the British Raj. Its last ruler acceded to the Union of India on 10 June 1948.
Jambughoda is a village and Tehsil in Panchmahal district in the Indian state of Gujarat. The village has a population of 2,731, while the overall tehsil has a population of 42,476.
Bodeli is a town and taluka in Chhota Udaipur district in the eastern part of the state of Gujarat, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jambughoda Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jambughoda Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jambughoda Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Vadodara Airport (51 km) and the nearest railway station is Vadodara Junction (55 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jambughoda Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jambughoda Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jambughoda Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Jambughoda Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jambughoda Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jambughoda State, Jambughoda, Bodeli.
